host.title: HOST
host.subtitle: Create a new room and invite players.

join.title: JOIN
join.subtitle: Enter a code to join game.

step1.title: Host or Join
step1.desc: Create a room as Host to select a quiz and invite players, or enter a Room Code to Join as a player.

step2.title: Select a Quiz
step2.desc: As a Host, browse and pick from available quizzes. Configure the number of questions, duration, and difficulty.

step3.title: Wait for Players
step3.desc: Share your Room Code with friends. Once everyone has joined the lobby, the Host starts the game.

step4.title: Answer & Race!
step4.desc: Answer questions as fast as possible! Points are awarded based on speed and accuracy. The fastest correct answer wins!
